channel.title: NUZU News
channel.description: NUZU: Real News in Real Time. Breaking headlines from 200+ trusted sources.

'Digger' sneak peek reveals Tom Cruise as an over-the-top oil tycoon who can destroy the world - Entertainment Weekly

A new poster for Warner Bros and Alejandro González Iñárritu’s Tom Cruise starrer ‘Digger’ has been unveiled. Tom Cruise revealed on social media that the trailer will release July 13. The film opens in theaters this October. More details on ‘Digger’ here: http - facebook.com
